notes: BG 6.32's engineering analog identifies a real distinction observable in code-review and incident-command culture — 'senior reviewer who reads by analogy with own remembered substrate' vs 'reviewer who leaves six terse blocking comments.' The midnight-PR-with-flaky-test scenario is recognisable. The named tools (GitHub PR, vitest, Postgres race, end-to-end suite) are operationally accurate. The implication ('run a brief self-check in their position') is testable. PASS.
